title: [SJ] Permissions
body:
The AntiBuild plugin is a BukkitAPI plugin for Minecraft 1.19 that allows server admins to control player permissions related to building and interacting with blocks and entities. It provides permissions for breaking and placing blocks, opening chests and other containers, hitting entities, picking up and dropping items, and becoming invisible to mobs. With this plugin, server admins can easily configure custom roles and assign specific permissions to each role using a permissions plugin such as LuckPerms.

The permissions added by the AntiBuild plugin are:

  • sj-perms.break: Allows/disallows players to break blocks.
  • sj-perms.place: Allows/disallows players to place blocks.
  • sj-perms.open_chest: Allows/disallows players to open inventory (chests, ovens, etc.).
  • sj-perms.attack: Allows/disallows players to damage objects (e.g. mobs or other players).
  • sj-perms.pickup: Allows/disallows players to pick up items from the ground.
  • sj-perms.drop: Allows/disallows players to drop items from their inventory.
  • sj-perms.entitytarget: Allows/disallows entities to react to players. (Entities will only react to players if the permission is set to "false")
  • sj-perms.chat: Allows/disallows the player to write in the in-game chat.
  • sj-perms.player_move: Allows/disallows the player to move the camera as well as to move around in the world.
  • sj-perms.god: Gives the player immortality and invulnerability to damage.
  • sj-perms.worlds_tp: Allows/disallows the player to move between game worlds.
